name: @remembrance/claude-code-plugin
description: Claude Code plugin for Remembrance auto-query hooks, skill docs, and MCP server configuration.

scripts.build: node scripts/refresh-mcp-bundle.mjs && node --check scripts/query-on-prompt.mjs && node --check scripts/contribute-on-stop.mjs && node --check scripts/record-detail-open.mjs && node --check scripts/codex-query-on-prompt.mjs && node --check scripts/codex-contribute-on-stop.mjs && node --check scripts/codex-record-detail-open.mjs
scripts.typecheck: node --check scripts/query-on-prompt.mjs && node --check scripts/contribute-on-stop.mjs && node --check scripts/record-detail-open.mjs && node --check scripts/codex-query-on-prompt.mjs && node --check scripts/codex-contribute-on-stop.mjs && node --check scripts/codex-record-detail-open.mjs && node --check scripts/refresh-mcp-bundle.mjs
